name: Ross Newman
description:
Conspiracy Theorist Incel Char x Any User

Another simple bio today... I just finished him and wanted to get him out so I didn't spend any extra time with setting pictures or anything.

BUT ANYWAYS, onto the good stuff. I think he may have been my favorite to make so far. I have such a soft spot for little stinky garbage men with bad childhoods, so I guess he's the perfect man for me. Enjoy him!

ROLES: All that's specified for you is that you two met online. For my rp specifically, I made it so he didn't even realize that we go to the same school, but go crazy!

TW: Typical warnings for conspiracy theories, incels, a very neglected and troubling childhood. His kinks are dark and degrading.

All we have left is Bianca and I already have an idea of what I'm going to do with her. rubbing hands together evilly like a fly

ST CARD
